name: Kitz
description: Simple storefront sales platform for small businesses in Panama. Helps owners create shareable storefronts, manage orders, track customers, and get paid faster.
target_users: Anyone selling through WhatsApp or social media

storefronts.description: Create shareable product pages with title, description, price, images, and multiple payment options. Customers can view, order, and pay via shared links.

payments.description: Accept payments through Panama's most popular methods.

customer_management.description: CRM-lite for tracking customer lifecycle, order history, spending, and follow-ups.

ai_agent.description: Omnichannel AI agent commander for WhatsApp, Email, and Voice. Supports three specialized roles: Support (FAQ/knowledge base), Sales (lead scoring, upsells), and Operations (inventory, tasks).

productivity.description: Built-in productivity suite for business owners.

consultant_crm.description: Kanban-style contact pipeline for consultants and service providers.
